document_summary: Official Peking University document X.F.[2022] No.13 appointing the administrative team of the School of Journalism & Communication. Dehuan Liu is appointed as Vice Dean. Document dated January 4, 2022, bearing Peking University seal.

snippets.text: # Notice on the Appointment of the Administrative Team of School of Journalism & Communication
snippets.subject: Official appointment notice for School of J&C administrative team
snippets.reasoning: Title of the official PKU document appointing Liu as Vice Dean.

snippets.text: The University has decided to appoint Gang Chen as the Dean of the School of Journalism & Communication at Peking University. Dehuan Liu, Kaihe Chen (with a probation period of one year), and Weijia Wang (also with a probation period of one year) have been appointed as Vice Deans of the School of Journalism & Communication at Peking University. Members of the original team will consequently be stepping down from their positions.
snippets.subject: Liu appointed Vice Dean of School of J&C (no probation period, unlike others)
snippets.reasoning: Official appointment text confirming Liu as Vice Dean without probation period, indicating established trust.

snippets.subject: Document reference number
snippets.reasoning: Official document number authenticating this as a formal PKU administrative document.

snippets.subject: Date of appointment document
snippets.reasoning: Date establishes when Liu's Vice Dean appointment was officially made.

relations.context: PKU appointed Liu as Vice Dean of School of J&C
